_comment: v13 closed gesture vocabulary. The VLM (qwen2.5vl:7b) must emit exactly one of these `id` values per frame. `tag` maps to a member of assets/tag_vocabulary.json that drives the decoration sticker; `tag: null` means the gesture is recognised but no decoration should fire (static poses / no-action). `animation` overrides the entry-animation pool; null falls through to the strength/motion-bucket fallback in _pick_entry.
